name: El Forastero Motorcycle Club
description: One-percenter motorcycle club founded in 1962 by Tom Fugle and Harlan 'Tiny' Brower in Sioux City, Iowa. Known for criminal activities including motorcycle theft and methamphetamine distribution. Considered a second-tier outlaw club after the 'Big Four'. Has chapters in Iowa, Minnesota, Kansas, and Missouri.
